name: @aspect/v9-edgejs-browser
description: EdgeJS browser runtime — Node.js in WebAssembly via Emscripten

scripts.test: node tests/test-basic.mjs && node tests/test-napi-bridge.mjs && node tests/test-guardrails.mjs
scripts.test:quick: node tests/test-basic.mjs && node tests/test-napi-bridge.mjs && node tests/test-guardrails.mjs
scripts.test:integration: node tests/test-basic.mjs && node tests/test-napi-bridge.mjs && node tests/test-guardrails.mjs && EDGEJS_STRICT_IMPORTS=1 node tests/test-wasm-load.mjs && node tests/test-runtime-stability.mjs && node tests/test-browser-smoke.mjs
